name: PPC audit input
text: Audit this Amazon PPC data. Separate facts from hypotheses; analyze spend, sales, ACOS, TACoS, CTR, CVR, CPC, placements, search terms, and budget pacing. Return prioritized actions with expected impact and risk.

name: SQP funnel analysis
text: Analyze this Search Query Performance data across impressions, clicks, cart adds, and purchases. Identify the largest funnel leaks, benchmark brand share by stage, and recommend the next three tests.
